title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.170 - Certificate — acceptance
text:
65.170.  Certificate — acceptance. — Such person shall, within ten days thereafter, cause such certificate, together with his acceptance of the office, to be filed in the office of the township clerk; his neglect or refusal so to do shall be deemed a refusal to serve.
(RSMo 1939 § 13955) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12278; 1919 § 13191; 1909 § 11679
